column2: Compare how chunk size affects retrieval quality and final answer quality in a RAG pipeline.
PDF: 24 pages | Chunk overlap: 200 | Top K: 3 | Embedding: all-MiniLM-L6-v2 | Temperature: 0.4
10 questions evaluated for each chunk-size configuration using retrieval quality and answer quality.

Both configurations produced strong final-answer quality. The 500-character configuration created more granular chunks, while the 1000-character configuration reduced the total number of chunks. The observed difference in final-answer quality was small.
